name: Black-Eyed Peas and Rice Salad
recipeIngredient: 10 ounces Frozen black-eyed peas (cooked according to package directions)
3/4 cup Extra-virgin olive oil (or part safflower oil)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the vinaigrette: Whisk together mustard, salt, pepper, and vinegar in a bowl.
2. Dribble in the oil while whisking until well combined.
3. Toss the cooked black-eyed peas and rice with the vinaigrette until everything is nicely coated.
4. Mix in the minced onion, garlic, grated carrot, and chopped chives or parsley.
5. Allow the salad to come to room temperature before serving.
6. To serve, place a bowl of salad surrounded by lettuce leaves at room temperature.
